headline: Why Meta is paying some creators in stablecoins — not cash
summary: Meta (META) is now paying some of its creators in stablecoins instead of cash. Scott Melker outlines what you need to know.  "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Field Notes: PayPal Reorganizes as AI and Quantum Reshape Commerce
summary: From executive shakeups to “Agentic Ready” payments, the industry’s biggest players are pivoting to meet the next era of intelligent computing.

headline: Countdown to Paypal (PYPL) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
summary: Get a deeper insight into the potential performance of Paypal (PYPL) for the quarter ended March 2026 by going beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining the estimates for some of its key metrics.

headline: Africa’s business leaders push for smarter growth at Paris forum {Business Africa}
summary: Across all discussions at the Business Africa Forum, a common thread emerged: self-determination. Whether through fintech innovation, practical AI adoption, or network-driven investment strategies, African entrepreneurs are actively reshaping the rules of engagement.

headline: PayPal Reshapes Venmo Segment As Investors Weigh Valuation And Earnings Outlook
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is restructuring its organization, designating Venmo as a standalone reporting segment. The company plans to appoint a new Venmo leader with digital banking experience to guide the business. The changes are intended to increase transparency into Venmo’s performance and expand future options for the asset, including a potential sale or partnership. For investors watching digital payments, Venmo has become a key part of how PayPal connects with younger and...
